name: Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride
description: A lightweight, non-greasy emollient that smoothes the skin.
scientificSummary: A mixed triester derived from coconut oil and glycerin, providing a lightweight feel and good oxidative stability.
mechanismOfAction: Forms a barrier on the skin's surface, decreasing skin moisture loss by preventing evaporation.

seo.title: Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride - Skin Softening | Dew Theory
seo.description: Learn about this versatile emollient that makes your skincare products feel silky smooth.
